body:
Building tools for builders — from Delhi

We are more than just a workplace — we are a family

Find the career of your dreams.

We know that finding a meaningful and rewarding job can be a long journey. Our goal is to make that process as easy as possible — and to create a work environment you will look forward to every day.

Engineering and Technology

We are looking for a QA Software Testing Engineer to ensure the quality and reliability of the SiteFlow platform. You will own the testing process across web and mobile applications, working closely with developers to identify and resolve issues before they reach our clients.

Full TimeDelhiEngineeringIIT/IIM startup
Responsibilities
  • Design and execute manual and automated test cases
  • Identify, document, and track software defects
  • Collaborate with developers on bug fixes and retesting
  • Maintain test plans, test scripts, and QA documentation
  • Conduct regression, performance, and UAT testing
Requirements
  • Experience in manual and/or automation testing
  • Familiarity with bug tracking tools (Jira etc.)
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Good communication skills in English
  • Experience with mobile app testing is a plus
Benefits
  • Be part of the core team of a fast-growing early-stage startup
  • Opportunity to work with brightest minds from IIT, IIM, and ISB
  • ESOPs, health insurance, hybrid work
This position is currently closed. We are not accepting applications at this time. Check back here for updates or write to us at careers@siteflow.com to register your interest.
Marketing and Design

We are looking for a Content Writer to create compelling, SEO-optimised content for the SiteFlow website, blog, and product documentation. You will write for a construction-sector B2B audience — contractors, builders, and project managers across India and the Gulf.

Full TimeDelhiContentB2B SaaS
Responsibilities
  • Write blog articles, landing pages, and case studies
  • Research construction industry topics for accurate content
  • Optimise content for SEO — keyword research and on-page
  • Collaborate with design and product on content strategy
  • Write product documentation and help centre articles
Requirements
  • Excellent written English — clear, active, jargon-free
  • Understanding of SEO fundamentals
  • Ability to research and simplify technical topics
  • Prior B2B or SaaS content experience preferred
  • Familiarity with construction or real estate is a plus
Benefits
  • Be part of the core team of a fast-growing early-stage startup
  • Opportunity to work with brightest minds from IIT, IIM, and ISB
  • ESOPs, health insurance, hybrid work
This position is currently closed. We are not accepting applications at this time. Write to careers@siteflow.com to register your interest for future openings.
Sales

We are looking for a Sales Executive to drive software sales in South India — Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Karnataka, and Andhra Pradesh. You will schedule and conduct product demos with construction companies and convert them into paying SiteFlow clients.

RemoteDelhiSouth IndiaFixed 20k–30k + incentives up to 20k
Responsibilities
  • Schedule and conduct product demo calls with new clients
  • Drive software sales through outbound and inbound calls
  • Attend customer queries and provide solutions
  • Meet monthly sales targets and conversion goals
Requirements
  • Tamil is mandatory + one of Malayalam, Kannada, or Telugu
  • Hindi and English communication skills
  • Online sales skills and experience
  • Personal laptop and Android mobile required
  • Basic MS Excel knowledge
This position is currently closed. Write to careers@siteflow.com to register your interest.

We are looking for a Sales Executive to drive software sales across North India. You will schedule and conduct demos with construction companies and convert them to paying clients — working remotely from Delhi.

RemoteDelhiNorth IndiaFixed 20k–30k + incentives
Responsibilities
  • Schedule and conduct product demo calls with new clients
  • Drive software sales through outbound and inbound calls
  • Attend customer queries and provide solutions
  • Meet monthly sales targets and conversion goals
Requirements
  • Strong Hindi and English communication skills
  • Online sales experience preferred
  • Personal laptop and Android mobile required
  • Basic MS Excel knowledge
This position is currently closed. Write to careers@siteflow.com to register your interest.

The Sales Manager will drive B2B sales activities, build a scalable sales team, and establish the right systems and processes across multiple channels. You will own the full sales funnel — from free to paid conversion — and set up new sales channels for the company.

Full Time, In-OfficeNoida3–7 YearsB2B SaaS SalesIIT/IIM startup
Responsibilities
  • Drive free-to-paid conversions through premium plan sales
  • Increase user engagement to drive premium conversions
  • Gather insights on use cases for paid plan conversions
  • Drive sales analytics for focused user messaging
  • Manage a team of tele-sales representatives
  • Set up new sales channels for the company
Requirements
  • 3–5 years of B2B sales experience
  • Experience managing sales targets and teams
  • Bachelors or Masters in any field
  • Strong customer relationship and analytical skills
  • Proficient with MS Excel
  • Excellent verbal and written communication
Benefits
  • Be part of the core team of a fast-growing early-stage startup
  • Opportunity to work with brightest minds from IIT, IIM, and ISB
  • ESOPs, health insurance, hybrid work
This position is currently closed. Write to careers@siteflow.com to register your interest.
Customer Service

We are looking for a Customer Service Executive to schedule demo calls with new clients, drive software sales over the phone, and resolve customer queries. This role sits within the sales team and is a key part of SiteFlow’s growth journey.

RemoteDelhi2–3 YearsHindi + English mandatory
Responsibilities
  • Schedule demo calls with new clients
  • Drive sales of software products through calls
  • Attend customer queries and provide solutions over phone
Requirements
  • Strong Hindi and English communication — both mandatory
  • Online customer support experience required
  • Personal laptop and Android mobile required
  • Basic MS Excel knowledge
This position is currently closed. Write to careers@siteflow.com to register your interest.

We are looking for a Customer Service Executive for South India — Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Karnataka, and Andhra Pradesh. You will handle demo scheduling, sales calls, and customer support for SiteFlow clients in these regions.

RemoteDelhiSouth IndiaTamil + South Indian language
Responsibilities
  • Schedule demo calls with new clients in South India
  • Drive sales of software products through calls
  • Attend customer queries and provide solutions over phone
Requirements
  • Tamil mandatory + one of Malayalam, Kannada, or Telugu
  • English communication skills required
  • Online customer support experience
  • Personal laptop and Android mobile required
This position is currently closed. Write to careers@siteflow.com to register your interest.
FAQ
FAQ

Questions about working at SiteFlow

SiteFlow is a fast-growing early-stage construction ERP startup based in Delhi and Noida. We build software used by 500 plus construction companies across India and the Middle East — helping builders, contractors, and project managers run their sites with clarity and control. The founding team includes people from IIT, IIM, and ISB, and we operate with a high-ownership, high-impact culture where everyone on the team shapes the product directly.

Yes. Even when positions are closed, we accept expressions of interest. Write to us at careers@siteflow.com with your name, the role you are interested in, and a brief note about your background. We keep a running list and reach out when a relevant position opens. We open new roles regularly, so checking back here is always worthwhile.

Our process is straightforward and fast. Typically it involves an initial screening call with the hiring manager, a short assignment or case relevant to the role, and a final conversation with the founding team. We aim to complete the full process within two weeks and give clear feedback at every stage. We do not believe in drawn-out processes that waste your time.

We are a team that genuinely cares about each other and the problem we are solving. We work hard, move fast, and celebrate wins together — the Holi photo on this page is a good example of how we are. We have a hybrid work culture so you get flexibility while staying connected to the team. Everyone has real ownership of their work and direct access to founders and leadership.

We offer competitive salaries benchmarked to the market, ESOPs so you share in the company’s growth, and comprehensive health insurance for you and your family. Sales roles include a fixed component plus monthly incentives. We believe people do their best work when they are compensated fairly and feel financially secure — so we take compensation seriously from day one.

Yes. We have a hybrid work culture across most roles. Several of our sales and customer service positions are fully remote. The Sales Manager and some engineering roles require in-office presence in Noida. Each job listing specifies the work arrangement — remote, hybrid, or in-office — so you know exactly what to expect before applying.

Not necessarily. Most of our roles — sales, customer service, engineering, content — do not require prior construction experience. What matters more is strong fundamentals in your area, a willingness to learn the domain quickly, and the ability to communicate clearly with clients. We will teach you everything you need to know about the construction industry as part of your onboarding.

The best way is to send your details to careers@siteflow.com and mention which department or role type interests you. We will reach out directly when something relevant opens. You can also follow us on LinkedIn at linkedin.com/company/SiteFlow — we post new openings there first. This page is kept up to date with all current positions so bookmarking it is a good idea too.

CTA
Join the team

Build software that runs
India’s construction sites.

We are a team that moves fast, cares deeply, and works on a real problem that affects millions of people. If that sounds like the kind of place you want to build your career — we want to hear from you.

Send Your Resume Learn About SiteFlow
